description: Diesel passenger-car registrations by year with particle-filter count and adoption percentage. Use when user asks when DPF became standard, how many diesels lack DPF, or filter-adoption trend.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _drivkraft_primaer == "Diesel" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 1995 AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= 2026 AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMiljoeOplysningStruktur.KoeretoejMiljoeOplysningPartikelFilter IS NOT NULL | STATS total = COUNT(*), with_particle_filter = COUNT(*) WHERE KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMiljoeOplysningStruktur.KoeretoejMiljoeOplysningPartikelFilter == true BY registration_year = _foerste_registrering_aar | EVAL without_particle_filter = total - with_particle_filter, filter_pct = ROUND(with_particle_filter * 100.0 / total, 1) | SORT registration_year ASC | LIMIT 40
